description: Represents a workload that is managed by an app agent.

IPAddresses.description: The list of IP addresses assigned to this workload.
IPAddresses.title: IPAddresses

kubernetes.description: If type is 'Kubernetes', this field contains the Kubernetes-specific selector configuration.
kubernetes.title: kubernetes

labels.description: The list of labels that loosely describe and identify this workload.
labels.title: labels

status.description: The current status of this workload.
status.title: status

workloadGroupHash.description: The hash of the workload group this application belongs to.
workloadGroupHash.title: workloadGroupHash

workloadGroupLabel.description: The label format of the workload group this application belongs to.
workloadGroupLabel.title: workloadGroupLabel

workloadID.description: The unique identifier for this workload.
workloadID.title: workloadID

title: Workload
